text.title: azure-devops-boards Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for azure-devops-boards as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents marking work items "Closed" without verifying acceptance evidence is attached.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Closing without evidence creates an audit gap. For regulated projects (CMMI), closure without an attached acceptance artefact fails SOX/SOC2 review.

failure-mode.description: Linking by bare work item ID instead of full URL in relation payloads.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ADO silently drops bare-ID relations. The relation must reference the full work-item URL to be persisted.
